name: Shougang Concord Century Holdings Limited
summary: Shougang Concord Century Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells steel cords for use in radial tyres in the People's Republic of China. It also engages in the manufacture of sawing wires and hose wires under the Eastern brand. In addition, the company invests in properties, as well as provides management, investment trading, and consulting services. It exports its products to Europe, the Middle East, and Africa, as well as North America, South America, and rest of Asia. The company was incorporated in 1991 and is based in Chai Wan, Hong Kong.
